⚕️ Medical Disclaimer

Based on the validated FINDRISC model (Lindström & Tuomilehto, Diabetes Care 2003) with South Asian population adaptations. This is for awareness only — not a medical diagnosis. Consult a qualified healthcare professional for blood tests and proper evaluation.

No personal data is stored · Anonymous tool
